prompt: Does vitamin C cure the common cold?
output:
- WFSB 3 Colorado Springs
It’s that time of year again, when you’ve got a runny nose and a scratchy throat. And if you’re not taking care of yourself, those symptoms can linger for days on end.
But what really works to keep you healthy this season?
When it comes to preventing or treating the common cold, there are many “cures” touted as effective in the press, but only a handful of studies have been done to actually prove they work
